title: ctenopteris geluensis
intro: Ctenopteris geluensis is a type of fern that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae, native to the tropical regions of Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ctenopteris geluensis include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of Ctenopteris geluensis may include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the leaves in hot water or mixing them with a solvent such as ethanol or glycerin.
